title: Trample No More
description: This mod adds a few nice tweaks to Minecraft's farmland trampling.
body:
This mod tweaks the farmland trampling mechanics to protect farmland from being trampled.

Features Include

  • The Feather Falling enchantment prevents farmland from being trampled.
  • Leather boots and other items with the tramplenomore:soft_boots item tag prevent crop trampling.
  • Creative mode players can not trample crops.

Like the mod and want to support me?
